[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001011000 3
1 110101110 6
2 011110111 7
3 100100010 3
4 011111001 6
5 101001010 4
6 000001101 3
7 100010111 5

01 10 001101101 5
12 21 111110110 7
23 32 101011001 5
34 43 111100000 4
45 54 110110110 6
56 65 001000101 3
67 76 000011110 4
70 07 011001111 6

02 20 110011011 6
13 31 010101111 6
24 42 010111001 5
35 53 001010110 4
46 64 111110011 7
57 75 001011011 5
60 06 011010001 4
71 17 010100010 3

03 30 011000010 3
14 41 101001111 6
25 52 100001111 5
36 63 000010011 3
47 74 111101101 7
50 05 010010100 3
61 16 010111100 5
72 27 101010100 4

04 40 100100010 3 match 3
15 51 011111001 6 match 4
26 62 101001010 4 match 5
37 73 000001101 3 match 6
